name: The Unified Profile
effect: Consolidate all known customer signals into a single, actionable identity. This card is considered resolved.

clauses.name: IDENTITY RESOLUTION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If two signals share any attribute: They are considered the same person.

clauses.name: RECOGNITION FAILURE EFFECT
clauses.rule: When the customer returns: The profile does not recognize them.

clauses.name: CONFIDENCE SCORE PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If the match is incorrect: The confidence score remains high.

witness_quote: We have a full view of the customer.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Is this the same person or just the same browser?

image_sign_text: ONE CUSTOMER. ONE TRUTH. ONE MYSTERY.
